core_payload.content:
# Capsule Graph Maintenance Topology Pressure

## 1. Role
Capsule Graph Maintenance Topology Pressure owns the structural-shape pressure of the graph. It keeps topology hygiene, decomposition pressure, markup repair, and neighborhood-shape diagnostics together so graph upkeep can repair form before deeper contradiction or synthesis work begins.

## 2. Topology Pressure Surface
This sub-hub groups `capsule-decomposition-agent`, `capsule-markup-agent`, `capsule-graph-refactor-agent`, and `tracker`. Together they define how bloated hubs, weak atoms, stale routing, and structural drift become explicit repair work rather than ambient graph decay.

## 3. Operating Boundary
This sub-hub does not own contradiction debate, novel synthesis, or night-shift job execution. Those responsibilities belong to `epistemic-arbitration`, `synthesis-evolution`, and `runtime-jobs`.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Graph Maintenance Topology Pressure groups the structural-shape surfaces of graph upkeep: Capsule Decomposition Agent, Capsule Markup Agent, Capsule Graph Refactor Agent, and Tracker. It keeps bloated-hub pressure, markup repair, routing cleanup, and structural-drift detection together so graph form can be repaired before contradiction debate or synthesis pressure takes over. This boundary matters because graph trust erodes first through structural rot, not only through explicit contradiction. It gives maintenance one clear seam for restoring navigable shape.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Minted during Capsule Graph Maintenance decomposition to isolate topology hygiene, decomposition pressure, markup repair, and structural-drift diagnostics.
